evals.prompt: 用可见模式控制 Visio，画一个登录流程图：用户 -> 登录 -> 校验 -> 成功进入首页 / 失败返回登录。要求使用 Visio 自带形状和动态连接线。
evals.expected_output: Creates a .vsdx file through visible Visio COM automation, uses built-in Visio masters, and verifies default right-angle/orthogonal dynamic connectors.
assertions: The response or generated script uses Visio.Application for visible mode.
The workflow opens a Visio stencil and drops masters rather than generating raw .vsdx XML.
The workflow defaults to right-angle/orthogonal dynamic connectors when the user did not explicitly request straight lines.
The verification checks OneD connectors and orthogonal routing cells.

evals.prompt: 把我给的 boardmix 截图复刻成可编辑 Visio 图，蓝色矩形是外部角色，粉色圆形是处理，黄色数据存储块用 Visio 的数据存储形状，所有箭头都要能随形状移动。
evals.expected_output: Chooses data-flow stencils such as DATFLO_M.VSSX, uses NameU masters, glues dynamic connector endpoints, saves .vsdx, and exports a preview.
assertions: The solution selects DATFLO_M.VSSX or an equivalent DFD stencil when available.
It uses built-in Data process, External interactor, Data store, and Dynamic connector masters by NameU.
It exports or otherwise verifies a visual preview before claiming completion.

evals.prompt: 我已经打开了一个 .vsdx 文件，请把里面所有连接线从直角改成直线，不要关闭我的 Visio 窗口。
evals.expected_output: Attaches to the open Visio document through ROT when locked, updates ShapeRouteStyle and ConLineRouteExt on OneD connector shapes, saves without closing the visible window.
assertions: The solution uses ROT attachment or equivalent if the file is already locked by visible Visio.
It updates only OneD connector shapes.
It saves the document without closing the user's visible Visio window.

evals.prompt: 帮我用 Visio 画一个 BPMN 流程，但你的技能文档里没有列 BPMN 的 master。请自己查找可用 master，验证后补充到技能资料里。
evals.expected_output: Runs local stencil/master discovery, finds BPMN_M.VSSX and Gateway/Task/Event masters, creates a tiny proof .vsdx, and records reusable discoveries in the reference catalog.
assertions: The workflow searches installed Visio stencils instead of giving up.
It verifies a discovered BPMN master by dropping it into a real Visio document.
It updates the skill reference catalog with verified master names.
